items.name: button
items.description: Gigaverse button — 8 variants incl. gold shimmer CTA, faction join, option card.

items.name: card
items.description: Card with 6 variants: standard, tweet, strip, recessed, panel, stat.

items.name: input
items.description: Text input with default / available / error states.

items.name: badge
items.description: Badge with rarity and faction variants.

items.name: command
items.description: Command palette (cmdk) with optional dialog wrapper.

items.name: combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select — popover + command palette + check icon.

items.name: form
items.description: react-hook-form wrapper with FormField / FormItem / FormLabel / FormControl / FormMessage.

items.name: calendar
items.description: Date calendar — react-day-picker wrapped in Gigaverse theme (gold selected, teal ranges).

items.name: date-picker
items.description: Date picker — popover trigger with calendar content; bitcell display format.

items.name: carousel
items.description: Embla-backed carousel with prev/next arrows (gigaverse.io landing pattern).

items.name: tweet-carousel
items.description: Social quote carousel — auto-advance (6s), pauses on hover, gold-pill dot navigation.

items.name: giga-primitives
items.description: Gigaverse-native primitives: StatusPip, PingPongLoader, FactionBadge, FactionJoinButton, RarityTag, ShimmerButton, AccentDivider, SectionDivider, StepProgress, StepProgressBar, StatBlock, SectionHeader, NumberedSectionHeader, LeftBorderAccent, CertificationRow, FactionPopulationCounter, SnapSection, EquipmentStrip, SectionAmbientPixels, LandingNavbar, LandingFooter.

items.name: giga-loader
items.description: Unicode/braille dot loaders (~100 presets via @dot-loaders/react) themed for Gigaverse — GigaLoader, GigaLoaderInline, GigaLoaderOverlay, GigaLoaderProvider, GigaLoaderPicker.

items.name: landing-modal-shell
items.description: LandingModalShell — branded Radix dialog with 3px teal/gold border, gradient header, and pixel close button.
